title: T661 Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) Expenditures Claim - Canada.ca
content:
## T661 Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) Expenditures Claim
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Form to claim for Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) in Canada

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (t661-fill-26e.pdf) Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2020 – Fillable PDF (t661-fill-20e.pdf) 2019 – Fillable PDF (t661-fill-19e.pdf) 2015 – Fillable PDF (t661-fill-15e.pdf) 2013 – Fillable PDF (t661-fill-13e.pdf) 2012 – Fillable PDF (t661-fill-12e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (t661-fill-26e.pdf)

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
